flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Butler University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Butler University are 46% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($77.2k vs $52.9k).
